summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 8→Jul 14 vs Jul 1→Jul 7* · Revenue -16% (966,939 vs 1,152,742 EGP) · Spend -11% · ROAS 5.42 (-5%).
   • CPC: 2.36 → 2.12 EGP (-10%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.17% → 1.01% (-14%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,159 → 1,140 EGP (-2%, ~flat)
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 54%* of the move (hurt, -153,189 EGP)  ·  *CPC 40%* of the move (helped, +20,156 EGP)  ·  *AOV 6%* of the move (hurt, -16,112 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -14%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-153,189 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -5%.
     Revenue -16% because spend -11%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *LF Ourkids Pj V2*, its CVR went 2.13%→0.44% on 6,792 EGP spend (~34% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 8→Jul 14 vs Jul 1→Jul 7* · Revenue +206% (170,602 vs 55,738 EGP) · Spend +135% · ROAS 4.17 (+30%).
   • CPC: 8.73 → 9.95 EGP (+14%, up (drag))
   • CVR: 1.8% → 2.38% (+32%, up (good))
   • AOV: 1,548 → 1,741 EGP (+12%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 53%* of the move (helped, +41,502 EGP)  ·  *CPC 25%* of the move (hurt, -5,014 EGP)  ·  *AOV 22%* of the move (helped, +18,914 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* rose +32%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *41,502 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS +30%.
     Revenue +206% because spend +135%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120255196079520011|BABY BOY OUTFITS>, its CVR went 1.87%→3.19% on 7,327 EGP spend (~46% of the swing).
